name: ESRF.net Validation Lab
description: Hidden, non-indexed environment for validating future ESRF.net pages, forms and features against the Cloudflare Pages branch preview. Not for public traffic.
rules: Every module page MUST include <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow"> and <meta name="googlebot" content="noindex,nofollow">.
Modules MUST NOT be linked from public navigation, footer, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, news-data.json, editorials list, index.html or any submit page.
Modules MUST display a TEST/VALIDATIE banner. No real sensitive or operational data may be entered.
Every module MUST have an owner and exit criteria before being promoted to main.
Promotion to main requires explicit approval on the draft PR; the test branch alone is never auto-merged.

modules.title: Gesimuleerde ESRF.net home (validatie-bezoekersreis)
modules.purpose: Gesimuleerde ESRF.net-startpagina die qua header, hero, footer en typografie aansluit op productie (index.html, style.css). Een subtiele staging-bar bovenaan en kleine 'Nieuw in validatie'-pillen markeren alleen de vernieuwde routes (geïntegreerd opgaveformulier, editorial bijdrage). Productie index.html is niet gewijzigd.
exitCriteria: Look & feel volgt productie (mast, hero, foundation, sectors, featured editorial, join, foot); alleen subtiele staging-bar en 'Nieuw in validatie'-pillen.
CTA's leiden naar submit-validation.html (organisatie / editorial / beide).
Geen publieke navigatie, footer, sitemap of robots verwijst hierheen.
Redactie keurt copy en NL-teksten goed.

modules.title: Opgavepad — validatievariant (redirect/landing naar submit-validation)
modules.purpose: Validatievariant van het klassieke opgavepad. Eenvoudige landingspagina die binnen 6 seconden doorstuurt naar submit-validation.html en handmatige CTA's biedt. De echte productiepagina request-listing.html blijft ongewijzigd.
exitCriteria: Meta refresh + handmatige CTA werken naar submit-validation.html.
TEST/VALIDATIE banner zichtbaar; geen wijziging aan productie request-listing.html.
Geen publieke link naar deze pagina.

modules.title: Regional Editorial Contributor Intake
modules.purpose: Validate the hidden contributor intake form for regional editorial submissions (Leadership Lessons, In het zonnetje, Regional Field Notes).
exitCriteria: Form validates required fields and honeypot blocks bots.
Local preview JSON renders correctly without backend submission.
Editorial reviewers approve content of banner, workflow note and field labels.

modules.title: Geïntegreerde opgave + editorial bijdrage (uitbreiding bestaand opgaveformulier)
modules.purpose: Prototype: bestaand atlas-opgaveformulier (request-listing.html) uitgebreid met optionele editorial bijdrage in één geïntegreerd formulier (organisatie / editorial / beide). Toont ook een aanbevolen architectuur voor veilige verwerking via Cloudflare Pages Function + private GitHub issue.

labButton.label: LAB-opslag (preview-only) — POST /api/intake-test
labButton.purpose: Knop in de previewstap die uitsluitend op preview-hostnames (*.esrf-clean.pages.dev / localhost) zichtbaar is en de payload met lab_test:true en het verplichte 'ESRF Lab Test'-prefix op contact.organisation én contact.name naar /api/intake-test stuurt. Notificatie is op deze route altijd uit; Directory_Master wordt nooit aangeraakt.
uiStatusMessages: LAB-rij toegevoegd aan de spreadsheet (LAB_*) of LAB DRY-RUN melding bij ontbrekende secrets.
Productie (404) en niet-bereikbaar zijn expliciet gemarkeerd in de UI.

exitCriteria: Modus-keuze (organisatie / editorial / beide) toont en valideert de juiste velden, incl. minimale lengte 20 op de korte editorial samenvatting.
Lokale preview rendert correct als JSON, tekst, en kopieerbare samenvatting; niets wordt verzonden.
Architectuurblok (Pages Function + Turnstile + private GitHub issue) is duidelijk en beoordeeld door redactie.
Wouter / redactie keurt de geïntegreerde UX en NL-teksten goed.
LAB-opslagknop is alleen zichtbaar op preview-hostnames; productie-bezoekers zien hem niet en de backend zou een eventuele directe POST hoe dan ook met 404 weigeren.

node functions/api/submit-validation-payload.test.mjs slaagt — bevestigt dat de buildLabBody-helper de juiste prefix, lab_test marker en payloadvelden produceert en dat /api/intake-test deze accepteert in org/editorial/both mode.

modules.title: Lab-automation voor /api/intake — workflow + LAB_* tabs + minimale notificatie
modules.readinessNote: Backend, LAB_* tabs and dry-run flow verified end-to-end on 2026-04-25 (submission sub_moelllvt_i21b). First successful sheet-only LAB write via /api/intake-test on 2026-04-26 (sub-test_mofow7u5_4dzv → LAB_Intake_Submissions row 4, LAB_Editorial_Intake row 3). Automatic minimal-notification route is now PREPARED but NOT ACTIVATED: the Cloudflare backend dispatches a sanitized notification payload (NOTIFICATION_CONTRACT allowed_keys only) to INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK when set; default is dry_run_not_configured because the env var is intentionally unset on every environment. The deferred mailrelay Apps Script source is checked into docs/apps-script-mail-notification.gs (separate project, only auth/script.send_mail scope; not part of the spreadsheet-only first-phase project). /api/intake-test never dispatches; an opt-in notification_simulate=true flag returns simulated_no_dispatch without any fetch. Production remains BLOCKED until the redactie ticks off the activation checklist in docs/intake-minimal-notification-design.md and docs/apps-script-mail-notification.future.md. No real email is sent until the operator opts in.

controls.directory_master_blocked: enforced (forbidden_targets + tab-prefix check on both ends)
controls.shared_secret: header x-esrf-intake-secret AND body shared_secret for Apps Script doPost
controls.method_handling: POST-only; OPTIONS preflight; 405 for other verbs
controls.turnstile: honoured when TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY set; warning emitted otherwise (lab leaves it disabled)
controls.rate_limit: TODO — runtime-dependent (Workers KV binding or Cloudflare WAF rate-limit rule on /api/intake)
controls.input_validation: per-mode required fields, ISO-3166 country, email shape, mandatory editorial + GDPR consents; HTML/control-char strip; length caps 600 / 2000
controls.minimal_notification: assertNotificationSafe enforces FORBIDDEN_NOTIFY_KEYS on both live + dry-run paths
controls.no_secrets_leak: secrets read from env only; upstream errors flattened to status code; no stack traces in responses
controls.cors: Vary: origin on every response; preflight only for allowed origins
controls.default_safe: dry-run by default when sheet/notify webhooks unset
controls.official_identity: office@esrf.net surfaced as official production recipient via OFFICE_IDENTITY constant; ai.agent.wm@gmail.com listed as non-production and hard-blocked by Apps Script FORBIDDEN_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS deny-list

productionBlockers: Apps Script webhook must be deployed under an office@esrf.net-owned Workspace project (so MailApp delivers from an ESRF identity).
Cloudflare Pages preview secrets (INTAKE_SHEET_WEBHOOK_URL + SHEETS_WEBHOOK_SECRET) are not configured.
INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO must be set to office@esrf.net (or another office@esrf.net-controlled inbox) before any real email is sent.
Redactie sign-off on activation gate in docs/intake-lab-test-report-2026-04-25.md §6b.
Optional: rate-limit (Workers KV binding INTAKE_RATELIMIT or Cloudflare WAF rule).

officialIdentity.note: office@esrf.net is the only documented production recipient. ai.agent.wm@gmail.com may exist as a temporary / non-production context (e.g. legacy Google Sheets connector identity in agent tooling) but must never back the production webhook or be configured as INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO.

modules.purpose: Lab-versie van de automatische intakeflow: backend POST /api/intake geeft een expliciete workflow (received → validated → stored_or_dry_run → notification_prepared_or_sent → next_required_action) terug, schrijft uitsluitend naar LAB_Intake_Submissions, LAB_Editorial_Intake, LAB_Place_Candidates, LAB_Backend_Log en LAB_Workflow_Events in de bestaande Drive-spreadsheet (id 1jGDFjTq5atrFSe3avjj4AflUo1SLPKAmkT_MIpH6z1g), en stuurt een PII-vrije notificatie. Directory_Master wordt nooit automatisch aangepast.

previewTestRoute.purpose: Preview-only single-write probe so ONE controlled lab-write can be validated end-to-end without re-opening /api/intake to general traffic. Production deploys short-circuit to 404 before any handler logic runs.
guardrails: Preview-only: production environment (CF_PAGES_BRANCH=main or unset) returns 404.
POST-only; OPTIONS preflight; 405 for other verbs.
Required prefix 'ESRF Lab Test' on contact.organisation AND contact.name (case-insensitive, prefix-only).
Forces meta.environment to 'TEST/VALIDATIE'; defence-in-depth re-check after sanitisation.
Live write requires BOTH INTAKE_SHEET_WEBHOOK_URL and SHEETS_WEBHOOK_SECRET; missing either flips to dry-run.

Notification disabled — INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK / INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO are deliberately ignored on this route; notification_status is always 'disabled_for_intake_test' and notification_sent is always false.
Writes only to LAB_* tabs; Directory_Master forbidden via assertLabPayloadSafe + tab-prefix re-check.
Same payload validation, body-size cap (64 KiB), origin allowlist, and JSON-shape checks as /api/intake.
Generic JSON errors only — no upstream stack traces, no env-var names, no shared-secret reflection.
previewTestRoute.middlewareBypass: /api/intake-test is on functions/_middleware.js BOT_FILTER_BYPASS_PATHS so an authorised operator can run a single curl POST against the Preview deploy without being 403'd by the UA filter. /api/intake itself is NOT bypassed; production HTML pages and the production intake remain fully protected.
previewTestRoute.tests: /functions/api/intake-test.test.mjs (method handling, preview-only guard, production blocked, lab_test marker, ESRF Lab Test prefix, LAB-only targets, Directory_Master forbidden, notification disabled, secrets-missing dry-run, success path with mocked sheet upstream, generic error messages).

labWriteEvidence.note: First successful sheet-only LAB write via /api/intake-test. Confirms end-to-end Apps Script path under office@esrf.net Workspace project. Directory_Master untouched; notification path remains disabled on this route.

exitCriteria: Backend response bevat een complete workflow met steps + next_required_action.
Sheet payload draagt target_prefix=LAB_ en noemt Directory_Master als verboden target; assertLabPayloadSafe weigert elke afwijkende vorm vóór de fetch.
Notification message bevat geen PII en geen editorial body — verifieerbaar via assertNotificationSafe en de bijbehorende tests.
Notification channel is gedocumenteerd als ESRF mailnotificatie / mailrelay-webhook (geen Gmail-specifieke wording); recipient (indien gezet) is office@esrf.net.

Apps Script reference (docs/apps-script-intake-webhook.gs) weigert niet-LAB-targets en Directory_Master, heeft een opt-in MailApp-route (NOTIFY_TO) die alleen activeert wanneer expliciet ingesteld, en blokkeert ai.agent.wm@gmail.com via FORBIDDEN_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS.
OFFICE_IDENTITY (official_recipient=office@esrf.net) is zichtbaar in storage_architecture en getest.

Productie blijft geblokkeerd zolang: (a) Apps Script niet onder office@esrf.net draait, (b) Cloudflare Pages preview secrets niet zijn gezet, (c) §6b activation gate niet is afgevinkt door de redactie.

node functions/api/intake.test.mjs slaagt voor alle dry-run, editorial-only, combined, place-candidate, recipient-metadata, no-Gmail-wording, security-gate (Directory_Master refusal, missing/invalid secret, dry-run default, minimal notification, office identity, POST-only, payload size, required consent) routes.

node functions/api/intake-test.test.mjs slaagt voor alle preview-only / production-blocked / lab_test-marker / ESRF Lab Test prefix / LAB-only / Directory_Master-forbidden / notification-disabled / secrets-missing dry-run / mocked success-path routes; node functions/_middleware.test.mjs bevestigt dat /api/intake-test wél en /api/intake niet op de bot-filter-bypass-lijst staan.
